title: Das ist Nico - Introducing Others
grammar_topic: Nominative articles der, die, das and indefinite ein, eine

grammar.topic: German articles - the hardest rule in A1

forms.der (masculine): der Mann, der Arzt, der Patient
forms.die (feminine): die Frau, die Aerztin, die Krankenschwester
forms.das (neuter): das Kind, das Krankenhaus, das Zimmer
forms.die (plural): die Maenner, die Frauen, die Kinder
forms.Rule: Always learn the article WITH the noun. Never learn a noun alone.

objectives: Use der, die, das correctly with common nouns
Understand that articles must be memorized with each noun
nursing_note: Das Krankenhaus (hospital), das Zimmer (room), die Station (ward), der Patient - you will use these from day one.
